ddls:
CREATE TABLE "employees" (
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employee */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the employee */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the employee */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the employee */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the employee */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the employee started working */,
  "last_login_time" TEXT /* Last login time of the employee */,
  "salary" REAL /* Annual salary of the employee */,
  "bonus_percentage" REAL /* Bonus percentage of the employee */,
  "is_senior_management" INTEGER /* Indicates if the employee is part of senior management */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the employee belongs to */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the employee */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the employee */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the employee */,
  "emergency_contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the emergency contact */,
  "emergency_contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the emergency contact */,
  "employee_status" TEXT /* Current status of the employee */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the employee */,
  "passport_number" TEXT /* Passport number of the employee */,
  "marital_status" TEXT /* Marital status of the employee */,
  "number_of_children" INTEGER /* Number of children of the employee */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "team_description" TEXT /* Description of the team */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team manager */,
  "location" TEXT /* Physical location of the team */,
  "budget" REAL /* Annual budget allocated to the team */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the team was created */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date the team information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance review */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee being reviewed */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date of the performance review */,
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reviewer */,
  "performance_score" REAL /* Performance score out of 100 */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments from the reviewer */,
  "review_cycle" TEXT /* Review cycle (e.g., annual, semi-annual) */,
  "review_type" TEXT /* Type of review (e.g., performance, 360-degree) */,
  "review_status" TEXT /* Status of the review (e.g., in progress, completed) */,
  "reviewer_department" TEXT /* Department of the reviewer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_reviews_reviewer_id FOREIGN KEY ("reviewer_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_reviews_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "salary_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each salary change */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Effective date of the salary change */,
  "new_salary" REAL /* New salary amount */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the salary change */,
  "previous_salary" REAL /* Salary before the change */,
  "percentage_change" REAL /* Percentage change in salary */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the person who approved the salary change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_salary_history_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bonus_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bonus change */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Effective date of the bonus change */,
  "new_bonus_percentage" REAL /* New bonus percentage */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the bonus change */,
  "previous_bonus_percentage" REAL /* Bonus percentage before the change */,
  "percentage_change" REAL /* Percentage change in bonus */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the person who approved the bonus change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bonus_history_approved_by FOREIGN KEY ("approved_by") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bonus_history_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employment_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employment history record */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the employment period */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the employment period */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position held by the employee */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the employee worked in */,
  "reason_for_change" TEXT /* Reason for the change in employment history */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the person who approved the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employment_history_approved_by FOREIGN KEY ("approved_by") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employment_history_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "department_description" TEXT /* Description of the department */,
  "head_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department head */,
  "location" TEXT /* Physical location of the department */,
  "budget" REAL /* Annual budget allocated to the department */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the department was created */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date the department information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_departments_head_id FOREIGN KEY ("head_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "positions" (
  "position_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each position */,
  "position_name" TEXT /* Name of the position */,
  "position_description" TEXT /* Description of the position */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department the position belongs to */,
  "grade" TEXT /* Grade or level of the position */,
  "required_skills" TEXT /* Required skills for the position */,
  "responsibilities" TEXT /* Responsibilities associated with the position */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the position was created */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date the position information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("position_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_positions_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., HR, Manager, Admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "last_password_change_date" TEXT /* Date of the last password change */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of the access event */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time of the access event */,
  "module_accessed" TEXT /* Module or section of the system accessed */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed by the user (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string for browser and device information */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Session ID for tracking user sessions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "benefits" (
  "benefit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each benefit */,
  "benefit_name" TEXT /* Name of the benefit */,
  "benefit_description" TEXT /* Description of the benefit */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date the benefit becomes effective */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the benefit ends */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee to whom the benefit applies */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the benefit record was created */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date the benefit record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("benefit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_benefits_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)
